name: auto-deploy
description: 前端自动化部署工具 - GUI桌面应用 + CLI

scripts.electron:pack: node -e "try{require('fs-extra').removeSync('release')}catch(e){}" && vite build && node -e "try{require('fs-extra').removeSync('node_modules/cpu-features')}catch(e){}" && electron-rebuild -f -w ssh2 && node -e "var p=require('path');var d=p.join(process.env.LOCALAPPDATA||'','electron-builder','Cache','winCodeSign','winCodeSign-2.6.0');var x64=p.join(d,'rcedit-x64.exe');var ia32=p.join(d,'rcedit-ia32.exe');var fs=require('fs');if(fs.existsSync(ia32)&&!fs.existsSync(x64)){fs.copyFileSync(ia32,x64);console.log('rcedit-x64 copied from ia32')}" && cross-env ELECTRON_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron/ ELECTRON_BUILDER_BINARIES_MIRROR=https://npmmirror.com/mirrors/electron-builder-binaries/ electron-builder
